full_text:
Liang Mao (Bofang) 涼茂 (伯方)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Mao (涼茂), styledBofang (伯方), was born in Changyi in Shanyang. Advised Gongsun Du against attacking Ye while Cao Cao was on campaign elsewhere. Liang Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Gongsun Du.
